title: ROMANIA enforcement action against RENAULT COMMERCIAL ROUMANIE S.R.L. (125,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 125,000 on RENAULT COMMERCIAL ROUMANIE S.R.L. The controller suffered a successful cyber attack due to insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure data security, resulting in a large quantity of per...
